# extract_audio_dir { #natural_features.extract_audio_dir }

```python
extract_audio_dir(
    directory,
    *,
    pattern='*.wav',
    resolution_s=1.0,
    selected_features=None,
    feature_params=None,
    resample_method='mean',
    execution_mode=None,
    as_dataframe=True,
    collapse=None,
)
```
